item.title: AutoCheck vs. Carfax: A Vehicle History Check
item.description: Two big names in vehicle history reports go head‑to‑head. Which one gives buyers the clearer picture?

item.title: Is this normal?
item.description: Chevy Dude spots a dealership practice that raises eyebrows. Is this really standard—or a red flag buyers should watch for?

item.title: Carfax's new feature
item.description: Carfax rolls out a new update for car buyers, but Chevy Dude questions whether it’s truly helpful or just hype.

item.title: Finders Keepers
item.description: An unexpected discovery sparks debate. What does Chevy Dude uncover, and does “finders keepers” really apply?

item.title: 5 Years of Lies
item.description: Five years of promises unravel into deception. What hidden truths does Chevy Dude expose about the dealership game?

item.title: Staying closed by choice
item.description: In a market where every sale counts, Chevy Dude explains why some dealerships choose to stay closed. What does this decision reveal about dealer strategy?

item.title: Carfax’s New Feature: Smart Move or Not?
item.description: Carfax rolls out a new tool for buyers, but is it truly helpful or just hype? What impact could this feature have on your next car purchase?

item.title: What Car Shopping Sites May Leave Out
item.description: Convenience comes at a cost—many car shopping sites skip key details like inspections, fees, and dealer tactics. What crucial info might you be missing before you buy?

media:content.media:title: What Car Shopping Sites May Leave Out
media:content.media:description: Convenience comes at a cost—many car shopping sites skip key details like inspections, fees, and dealer tactics. What crucial info might you be missing before you buy?
